name: zfmv_script_reset
description: zFMV_Script::Reset either rewinds the current action or destroys the action list and clears list state.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 35 unmasked mismatches after trimming 9 trailing VC NOPs; Binary Ninja body is 71 bytes and the VC object body is 80 bytes.

A source-equivalent destroy-path fallthrough rewrite improved the VC5 mismatch count from 56 to 35; remaining drift is dominated by VC5 compiling the typed vtable scalar-deleting call as a stack-argument call because the VC5-safe RECOIL_THISCALL macro is empty for function-pointer fields.
The native smoke covers Reset(0) preserving the list and setting current=head, plus Reset(1) deleting every action with flags=1 and clearing head/tail/current.
